heading: Adoption of certain standards
label: 2623 Adoption of certain standards
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in subsecs. children.text: adopt the standards established by subsection (b) (other than paragraph (4) thereof) if, and to the extent, such authority or nonregulated electric utility determines that such adoption is appropriate to carry out the purposes of this chapter, is otherwise appropriate, and is consistent with otherwise applicable State law, and

adopt the standard established by subsection (b)(4) if, and to the extent, such authority or nonregulated electric utility determines that such adoption is appropriate and consistent with otherwise applicable State law.

children.heading: Master metering
children.label: 1 Master metering
children.text: To the extent determined appropriate under , master metering of electric service in the case of new buildings shall be prohibited or restricted to the extent necessary to carry out the purposes of this chapter.section 2625(d) of this title

children.heading: Automatic adjustment clauses
children.label: 2 Automatic adjustment clauses
children.text: No electric utility may increase any rate pursuant to an automatic adjustment clause unless such clause meets the requirements of .section 2625(e) of this title

children.heading: Information to consumers
children.label: 3 Information to consumers
children.text: Each electric utility shall transmit to each of its electric consumers information regarding rate schedules in accordance with the requirements of .section 2625(f) of this title

children.heading: Procedures for termination of electric service
children.label: 4 Procedures for termination of electric service
children.text: No electric utility may terminate electric service to any electric consumer except pursuant to procedures described in .section 2625(g) of this title

children.heading: Advertising
children.label: 5 Advertising
children.text: No electric utility may recover from any person other than the shareholders (or other owners) of such utility any direct or indirect expenditure by such utility for promotional or political advertising as defined in .section 2625(h) of this title

children.heading: Procedural requirements
children.label: c Procedural requirements
children.text: Each State regulatory authority (with respect to each electric utility for which it has ratemaking authority) and each nonregulated electric utility, within the two-year period specified in subsection (a), shall (1) adopt, pursuant to subsection (a), each of the standards established by subsection (b) or, (2) with respect to any such standard which is not adopted, such authority or nonregulated electric utility shall state in writing that it has determined not to adopt such standard, together with the reasons for such determination. Such statement of reasons shall be available to the public.
